channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bang Bang Shrimp Pasta
item.description: Bang bang shrimp pasta is what weeknight dinner dreams are made of! Juicy shrimp, tender pasta, and that irresistible sweet-and-spicy…

item.title: Last chance: Earn up to 5 free nights with the World of Hyatt Card
item.description: If you have an upcoming stay at any Hyatt property, the World of Hyatt personal and business cards can help save you a ton of money. Here's what to kn...

item.title: UPDATE: Global Entry shuts down, but TSA PreCheck won't be suspended
item.description: The TSA plans to keep PreCheck open after reports suggested the fast-tracked lanes could be closed amid the federal government shutdown.

item.title: How to Hide Google’s AI Overviews From Your Search Results
item.description: You can avoid Google’s AI summaries in your search results by simply adjusting your query. Or just switch search engines altogether.

item.title: Creatine Supplements Are Everywhere. Do I Need Them? (2026)
item.description: It’s the most studied supplement in sports medicine, but it’s not just for athletes anymore.

item.title: What Is Down Fill Power (2026): Fill Weight, Synthetics

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Waymo makes its defense
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: How to View the ‘Blood Moon’ Total Lunar Eclipse on March 3
item.description: Next month, the Earth will come between the sun and the moon, causing the moon to take on an eerie reddish hue.

item.title: What to Know About At-Home STI Tests: Pros, Cons, and Recommendations (2026)
item.description: It's easier than ever to test for sexually transmitted infections at home. We break down whether or not you should.

item.title: Trump says Netflix will face ‘consequences’ if it doesn’t fire board member Susan Rice
item.description: Netflix board member Susan Rice had predicted that corporations that “take a knee” to Trump will be “held accountable” when Democrats return to power.

item.title: United's new MileagePlus reality: Cardholders win, others lose ground
item.description: United Airlines shook up its loyalty program this week with new incentives for credit cardholders, and hurdles for those who don't carry a card.
